name: Airspan Networks Holdings Inc. Common Stock
summary: Airspan Networks Holdings Inc. Common Stock provides 4G and 5G network densification solutions to mobile network operators, municipalities, and other customers. The company offers a range of products and services, including small cells, massive MIMO antennas, and network management software. Headquartered in Boca Raton, Florida, Airspan Networks aims to improve wireless network performance and capacity.
